exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ img and not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](k0, lim) }
let w31: Real satisfy { w31 ∈ img and not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](w31, lim) }
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ img or lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](x0, lim) }(w31)
function(x0: Real, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Nat) { x0 != x1(x2) or image(x1, x0) }(a(n), a, n)

exists(k0: Nat) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](a(k0), ub) }

function(x0: Nat) { lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](a(x0), ub) }(w25)
function(x0: Nat) { a(x0) <= ub }(i)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat) { k0 <= x0 implies a(x0) <= ub } }
proof: function(x0: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat) { lib(lte).LTE.lte[Nat](x0, k0) and not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](a(k0), ub) } }(Nat.zero)
let w0(arg0: Nat) -> w0_result: Nat satisfy { lib(lte).LTE.lte[Nat](arg0, w0_result) and not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](a(w0_result), ub) }
function(x0: Nat) { lib(lte).LTE.lte[Nat](x0, w0(x0)) }(w0(Nat.zero))
function(x0: Nat) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](a(w0(x0)), ub) }(w0(Nat.zero))
function(x0: Nat) { lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](a(x0), ub) }(w0(Nat.zero))
function(x0: Nat) { lib(lte).LTE.lte[Nat](x0, w0(x0)) }(Nat.zero)
function(x0: Nat) { not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](a(w0(x0)), ub) }(Nat.zero)
function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { not exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat) { not k0 <= x2 or x0(x2) <= x1 } } or eventual_ub(x0, x1) }(a, ub)
function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { not eventual_ub(x0, x1) or not converges(x0) or lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](limit(x0), x1) }(a, ub)

exists(k0: Real) { is_set_upper_bound(img, k0) and not lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](lim, k0) }

function(x0: Real) { not is_set_upper_bound(img, x0) or lib(lte).LTE.lte[Real](lim, x0) }(w33)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder, T1: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) or not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) }[Real, Real](f, x, y)

let w1: Real satisfy { w0 <= w1 and not f(w0) <= f(w1) }
let w2: Real satisfy { w0 <= w2 and not f(w0) <= f(w2) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0 <= x1 or f(x0) <= f(x1) }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Set[Real], x2: Real) { image_contains(x0, x1, x2) = function_image_contains(x0, x1, x2) }(f, s, y)

function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Set[Real], x2: Real) { x2 ∈ function_image(x0, x1) = function_image_contains(x0, x1, x2) }(f, s, y)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { s.contains(k0) and y = f(k0) }
proof: function[T0, T2](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1(k0) = x2 } = image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[Real, Real](s, f, y)

function(x0: Set[Real], x1: Real, x2: Real) { not is_set_supremum(x0, x1) or not is_set_upper_bound(x0, x2) or x1 <= x2 }(fs, sup_fs, f(sup_s))
function(x0: Real) { not is_set_supremum(function_image(f, s), x0) or not x0 <= f(sup_s) }(sup_fs)

function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Set[Real], x2: Real) { not is_nonempty(function_image(x0, x1)) or not is_nondecreasing(x0) or not is_set_supremum(x1, x2) or exists(k0: Real) { is_set_supremum(function_image(x0, x1), k0) and k0 <= x0(x2) } }(f, s, sup_s)
